name: Hugging Face
description: Hugging Face Inference API provides serverless access to thousands of open-source AI models across multiple providers. It supports text generation, image generation, embeddings, classification, and speech recognition through a unified OpenAI-compatible interface.

capabilities.name: chat_completion
capabilities.description: Generate conversational AI responses using any supported open-source language model. OpenAI-compatible endpoint with automatic provider selection.

capabilities.name: generate_text
capabilities.description: Generate text continuations from a prompt using open-source language models hosted on Hugging Face infrastructure.

capabilities.name: generate_image
capabilities.description: Generate images from text prompts using diffusion models like FLUX and Stable Diffusion.

capabilities.name: embed_text
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings from text inputs using feature extraction models for semantic search and retrieval.

capabilities.name: classify_text
capabilities.description: Classify text into categories using zero-shot or fine-tuned classification models.

capabilities.name: transcribe_audio
capabilities.description: Convert speech audio files to text using automatic speech recognition models like Whisper.

capabilities.name: list_models
capabilities.description: List available models with their supported providers, tasks, and configuration details.
